text.tspan: A German enterprise license at the operational core of the nation's energy, power, metals, telecom and defence backbone.
Modelled: SAP-running enterprises ≈ 12–18% of India's GDP (central ~15%) at the system-of-record layer.
Source: company & SAP implementation-partner disclosures; Techadyant Labs. Markers at HQ; map schematic; to be re-confirmed vs annual reports.
